name: Potential Malicious AppX Package Installation Attempts
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Potential Malicious AppX Package Installation Attempts
SIGMA Description: Detects potential installation or installation attempts of known malicious appx packages

False positives:
- Rare occasions where a malicious package uses the exact same name and version as a legtimate application

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('400', '401')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%3669e262-ec02-4e9d-bcb4-3d008b4afac9%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Malicious AppX Package Installation Attempts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('400', '401')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%3669e262-ec02-4e9d-bcb4-3d008b4afac9%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Malicious AppX Package Installation Attempts
